sub: Dumb questions, worse confessions — chaos that gets funnier.

1.name: Silly
q: What's the weirdest thing you've said to a pet with total sincerity, fully expecting it to understand you?
What smell would you end a friendship over?
What's the most confidently wrong you've ever been — and did anyone actually stop you?
Describe your current mood using only kitchen appliances.
Which childhood toy was clearly designed to torment the adult in the room, not the kid?
Your worst decisions all share one theme song. What genre is it, and does it have a key change?
What's the strangest thing you've Googled while fully convinced it was a medical emergency?
What's a completely made-up rule you follow religiously for absolutely no reason?
You're a flavour of crisp nobody asked for. What's the flavour, and who's still finishing the bag?
Rank cereal, sandwiches, and soup by how far you'd go to defend each one's honour in a fight.
What sound, specifically, ends your entire mood the instant you hear it?
What's the strangest item you own that you also proudly display on a shelf?
What's a lie you told so long ago it's now basically load-bearing?
What's your most delusional "I could genuinely do that for a living" belief?
If your star sign came with a legally mandated warning label, what would it say?
What's the most dramatic you've ever been in a supermarket, and were there witnesses?
What household chore will you negotiate, lie, or fake an injury to get out of?
What's a word you say with total confidence despite having no real idea what it means?
What inanimate object are you currently holding a completely irrational grudge against?
What's the most useless talent you'd still proudly list on a dating profile?
What noise does your soul make the second you sit down after a genuinely long day?
What's the most chaotic thing currently open in one of your browser tabs right now?
What skill did you peak at in primary school and have been quietly coasting on ever since?
What's a bad decision you've made that, honestly, given the chance again, you'd repeat?
What's the wildest justification you've used for a purchase you did not need?
What's a rule your family invented that you only recently realised isn't a universal law?
What's the most "main character" you've ever felt over something objectively tiny?

2.name: Absurd
q: You get cloned, but the clone only inherits your worst habits, maxed out. What's clone-you doing right now?
Everyone vote: who in this room becomes a cult leader first, and what's the cult actually about?
You're handed a parallel-universe version of yourself who made exactly one different choice, early on. What's different about their life?
Death shows up to collect you, but they're clearly new to the job and visibly nervous. Talk them through it.
Everyone vote: whose ghost would be the single most annoying one to get haunted by?
Your soul just received a formal, written customer complaint. Read us the opening line.
What's your hottest take about something almost everyone else in this room probably loves?
Would you rather sing every request you make for the rest of your life, or whisper every compliment you ever give again?
You wake up as the clearly-doomed side character in someone else's story. Whose story, and how do you go?
Everyone vote: who here is most likely to accidentally start a small war over something genuinely petty?
What's a secret society you would join purely, unapologetically, for the outfits?
Your evil twin exists somewhere and is, infuriatingly, doing better than you. What did they do differently?
Pitch the group your autobiography title, as written by someone who has personally had enough of you.
Would you rather your thoughts were subtitled live for everyone to read, or your inner monologue played on speaker for a week?
What's the worst possible thing to accidentally manifest into your actual life?
Everyone vote: who's getting recruited by aliens first — and are they going quietly?
What wellness trend are you convinced is just a cult with better branding?
You get one wish, but it's granted by a raccoon who resents you slightly. How does that go?
Your group chat gets subpoenaed. What's the one message that ends the whole case?
Would you rather know the exact date you die, or know exactly what everyone actually thinks of you, out loud, forever?
What's a genuinely terrible tattoo idea you would still, unfortunately, consider?
Pitch the worst possible theme park ride, and give it a name that would somehow still get approved.
What's the most chaotic possible thing to hear announced over a supermarket tannoy?
Everyone vote: who's most likely to fake their own disappearance and actually pull it off?
What's a hot take you have about how funerals, weddings, or birthdays are actually done wrong?
You've been legally assigned a government nemesis. What did you do to deserve one?
What's a completely made-up cosmic rule you're personally convinced governs the universe, zero evidence?

3.name: Unhinged
q: What's the wildest thing you've ever done purely because you were bored?
Everyone vote, right now: who in this room ends up on a true-crime podcast — as the subject, not the host?
Deliver a eulogy for your own dignity. Cause of death: be specific.
What's the most deranged voicemail you've ever left someone, and do you even remember sending it?
You get audited by the universe. What's the one line item it flags?
What's the worst thing you've said about someone the second they left the room — no names, just the crime?
What's the most elaborate lie you've ever told to win an argument you already knew you'd lost?
You've died and you're being interviewed for your afterlife placement. What's the one answer that gets you sent somewhere worse?
Pitch your own cult. What's the one rule new members have to accept immediately, no negotiating?
You get unlimited money and zero consequences for exactly one hour. Go.
Everyone vote: who cracks first under professional interrogation, and over what?
Do your best impression of what your group chat sounds like to someone who isn't in it.
What's a secret you've kept that, if it came out, would honestly just be a bit funny — not even that bad?
What's the most feral revenge you've ever taken over something genuinely small?
What's the hottest, most indefensible take you have that you will die on, no matter who's in the room?
What's the most desperate move you've ever pulled purely to avoid admitting you were wrong?
What's the most chaos you've caused while outwardly pretending to be completely calm?
Give us your unhinged theory about where socks actually go when they vanish in the wash.
Whose villain era is happening right now, tonight, live, in this room?
What's the darkest joke you know that is, somehow, still technically wholesome?
If your worst 3am thought got printed on a t-shirt you had to wear tomorrow, what does it say?
Explain your entire personality using only the receipt from your worst purchase.
Would you rather everyone could hear your exact thoughts for one full day, or you had to say every thought out loud for one full hour?
What's the boldest rumour you could start about yourself tonight that would actually spread?
Everyone vote: who's most likely to talk their way out of an actual arrest on confidence alone?
What's the strangest personal rule you live by that's way too specific to explain — and you're only admitting it now?
What's the smallest thing that has ever made you briefly, completely lose your mind?

wild: Do a dramatic movie-trailer voiceover for whatever's happening in this room right now.
Do your best impression of the last person who genuinely annoyed you — no names, let the room guess who.
Announce the next round like a boxing ring announcer. Full volume, full drama, no exceptions.
Play both sides of a full-blown argument that started from one misread text message.
Give a slow-motion instant replay, with commentary, of the last clumsy thing you did today.
Strike a dramatic "I've just been betrayed" pose and hold it while the group invents increasingly ridiculous reasons why.
Pitch a fake perfume ad for how this exact moment, right now, smells.
Do your best impression of how you think you look dancing when you're sure no one's watching.
Deliver your next answer like a hostage negotiator gently talking everyone down.
Act out getting devastating news that turns out to be about something incredibly minor.
Do an impression of your own voicemail greeting — but the brutally honest version.
Whisper your next answer like it's classified information. Immediately deny you said anything.
Give the most dramatic possible reaction to someone else reaching for your food.
Do sixty seconds of stand-up about the single most annoying appliance in your home.
Give the most over-the-top motivational-speaker pep talk you can about doing absolutely nothing for the rest of tonight.
Answer the next question as your own evil twin — same facts, worst possible motives.
final: Last one. Everyone silently picks the exact moment tonight you laughed the hardest.
On three, act it out again — badly, all at once, no context for anyone watching.
That's the one you'll actually remember. Go cause a better one.
